description: An array of extracted hardware specifications from laptop listings.

listing_id.description: The listing_id provided in the input.

gpu_name.description: GPU model name. Empty string if absent.

vram_capacity.description: VRAM in GB as a whole number. Return 0 if absent.

cpu_name.description: CPU model. Empty string if absent.

total_system_ram.description: System RAM in GB as a whole number. Return 0 if absent.

storage.description: Storage spec. Empty string if absent.

egpu_model.description: eGPU enclosure name if mentioned. Empty string if absent.

touchscreen_digitizer.description: true if title explicitly mentions touchscreen or digitizer.

exact_model_name.description: Exact laptop chassis model. Empty string if absent.
